flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Greater Altoona Career & Technology Center vs the 2003–2007 baseline (74.4% vs 80.1%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Greater Altoona Career & Technology Center rose 236% between 2021 and 2024 (21.8% → 73.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Greater Altoona Career & Technology Center fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Greater Altoona Career & Technology Center rose 71% between 2006 and 2009 (141 → 241).
